text:
16, "General Exclusions from Coverage," the 
following are also excluded from coverage as home health services: 

80.1 - Drugs and Biologicals 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3125.A, HHA-230.A 

Drugs and biologicals are excluded from payment under the Medicare home health 
benefit. 

A drug is any chemical compound that may be used on or administered to humans or 
animals as an aid in the diagnosis, treatment, prevention of disease or other condition, for 
the relief of pain or suffering, or to
